methodology.confidence_interval: normal approximation for smoke-capable pure paths; bootstrap resampling required for published qualification results

build_controls.logging: disabled for latency/throughput measurements; separately measured when enabled

c_references.interface: Pure decision function accepting canonical policy and request bytes; no parsing or I/O in timed region.
c_references.unqualified_reason: Interface specified; reference implementation not yet approved.

c_references.interface: Canonical CBOR encode/decode over preallocated buffers using the same message schema.
c_references.unqualified_reason: Interface specified; reference implementation not yet approved.

c_references.interface: HMAC-SHA256 over the versioned frame header and payload with fixed key material.
c_references.unqualified_reason: Interface specified; reference implementation not yet approved.

c_references.interface: Bounded newline/Content-Length framing over preallocated buffers; excludes policy parsing and server I/O.
c_references.unqualified_reason: Interface specified; reference implementation not yet approved.

c_references.interface: libbpf ring-buffer callback decoding the versioned event ABI without policy logic.

fixed_adapter_baselines.definition: Pinned language-neutral harness issuing identical Apple container lifecycle calls with identical image, mounts, networking, logging, and guest policy services held constant or disabled.
fixed_adapter_baselines.unqualified_reason: ADR-003 and reference host are pending.

fixed_adapter_baselines.definition: Pinned language-neutral harness issuing identical nerdctl/containerd/Kata lifecycle calls with identical image, kernel, mounts, networking, logging, and guest policy services held constant or disabled.
fixed_adapter_baselines.unqualified_reason: ADR-006 and reference host are pending.

fixed_adapter_baselines.definition: Pinned language-neutral harness issuing identical Hyperlight lifecycle calls with identical kernel, rootfs, mounts, networking, logging, and guest policy services held constant or disabled.
fixed_adapter_baselines.unqualified_reason: Capability matrix and reference host are pending.

minimum_supported_bpf_event_rate.reason: The numeric no-loss event rate must be measured on the selected kernel/host matrix; guessing is prohibited.
